programmes.show_description: May is keen to make a career move to a bigger station, but both Jack and Cecil are set against her going and both try to apply for a transfer to be near her. S1 E8: Job Opportunity
Gary thinks that Yvonne is having an affair, so he asks Ron to spy on her. Plus, Gary and Phoebe join a concert troupe in Belgium, but their efforts are quickly thwarted. S6 E7: How I Won the War
It turns our that Mr. Bean isn't very good at looking after things in a laundrette, and he later has difficulty keeping control of his ball during a round of mini golf. E12: Tee Off, Mr. Bean
Sam uncovers corruption in CID when he takes on a local crime boss. When the crime boss takes steps to stop Sam's investigation, will Gene do what is right? Starring John Simm. S1 E4
Reunited at last, Beryl and Sandra clash over their mothers when Beryl shatters Sandra's Rex-fuelled fantasy. Hurt and angry, Beryl moves out, threatening their fragile friendship. S10 E7: Moving Out
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
This is where Brenda meets Malcolm - they are both very different and this causes problems, but they find themselves drawn to one another. S1 E1: Meeting
Sharon and Tracey get a glimpse of a possible future when they see two elderly sisters in the supermarket, and Dorien's court case comes to a conclusion. S10 E8: You Can't Always Get What You Want
Mr. Bean goes to a swimming pool but struggles with the diving board, attempts to leave a car park in style and demonstrates some sandwich-making. E3: The Curse of Mr. Bean
The couples join a coach trip to the mountains where David buys Linda a gypsy shawl she has admired - when Amy finds that she has lost her money, David sells his watch. S1 E4: Spanish Lace

Eli is planning a weekend away while Nellie wants to decorate the cellar, but an error means that Eli and Nellie are stuck together for the weekend. S3 E5: Getting To Know You

The Honourable Teddy creeps upstairs every night and tries to get into Ivy's room, and Lady Lavender is bent on giving away her shares of the family fortune to the servants. S1 E2 The Deed of Gift
Rigsby is looking for another lodger - one of his current lodgers, Miss Jones, is keen for her acquaintance Philip to move in because she is attracted to him. S1 E1: The New Lodger
A foreign revolutionary arrives at the house asking after Wolfie and talking about financial support. S2 E5: Spanish Fly
It's Grandad's 75th birthday, and Jack and Adrian buy him a present which turns out to be more valuable than they think. S3 E2

Gary and Phoebe's nightclub falls foul to a protection racket. Ron is heartbroken after being dumped by Flic, and Yvonne receives a rude surprise. S6 E8: Something Fishie

Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. The murder of a football fan results in a clash of methods as Sam and Gene go undercover in a local pub. Starring John Simm. S1 E5

Dorien is treating Sharon and Tracey to a Christmas trip to the Canary Islands; with an overdramatic passenger also on board, the plane does not reach its destination. S11 E1: Birds on a Plane

With growing competition, the factory faces closure, leaving Eli and Nellie penniless, starving, and with no staff. S3 E6: Two Pennies To Rub Together
David refuses to go with Amy to visit the ruins by saying that he already booked a court to play tennis with Linda; Robert still does not suspect, but Amy finally sees the evidence. S1 E6: Forty Love
Poppy arranges a secret assignation with James, and a fancy dress party is planned to celebrate Cissy's birthday which brings a few surprises. S1 E3 Love or Money
Rigsby becomes convinced that magic is real after Philip bangs a ritual spear on the floor - while Ruth tries to offer herself to Rigsby, Philip and Alan play a trick on him. S1 E2: Black Magic
When an old school friend - now a successful American record producer - drops back into town, Wolfie begins to see himself as a rockstar in the making. S2 E6: Rock Bottom
Adrian undergoes a character change, Mr and Mrs Boswell have an unforgettable lunch, and Jack suffers a crisis of conscience. S3 E3
Sandra enjoys a passionate week with Rex while her mums in hospital, but normality soon returns. Beryl hears from runaway Gwyn, and Mrs Hennessey seeks divine lottery tips. S10 E6: Out of Hospital
The Minister for Transport is on his way to visit the station, but disaster awaits as there is no milk left at the train's buffet for his cup of tea! S2 E1: No Milk For The Minister
Poppy arranges a secret assignation with James, and a fancy dress party is planned to celebrate Cissy's birthday which brings a few surprises. S1 E3 Love or Money
George has been claiming for a non-existent son for the past 19 years in order to fiddle his tax returns, but he is in danger of being caught when a tax inspector visits. S4 E6: My Son, My Son
Mr. Brown is offered a better job at a rival English school if he quits and starts the next day. When the new job falls through, he has to figure out how to get his old one back. S3 E4: Just the Job
An unexpected visit coincides with Andy and Fergie's Royal Wedding. Alf Garnett has rivals for his affections. In Sickness and In Health S2 E6
